description_long: This jacuzzi features an octagonal basin with a blue-tiled interior, surrounded by a wide, stone-textured deck that extends outward in a symmetrical, rounded pattern. The water inside is clear and appears to be nearly full, with a gentle ripple effect visible on the surface. A metallic ladder with two vertical rails and several rungs is attached to one side, providing easy access into the water. The exterior base of the jacuzzi is dark and solid, likely constructed from a durable material to support the weight of the water and users. The deck surface is patterned with light gray and beige tiles, giving it a refined, urban look suitable for parks, patios, or upscale public spaces. No visible jets, control panels, or steps are present, and the jacuzzi is uncovered.
description: An octagonal, blue-tiled jacuzzi with a wide stone deck and a metal ladder, filled nearly to the top with clear water. The exterior is dark and solid, and the deck features a light, patterned tile finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metal ladder on the left side and the wide, patterned stone deck surrounding the blue-tiled jacuzzi basin.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the jacuzzi, the metal ladder positioned at the near edge, and the symmetrical extension of the stone deck.
description_view_2: Rear view with the ladder now on the right, showing the same wide stone deck and the blue water surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the ladder at the far edge, emphasizing the elongated shape and the deck's rounded extensions.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water close to the top edge
